headline: Hantavirus Cruise Cucks 😷🚢 RAT-FUCKED 💀🦠 in Global Panic Party!
text:
🚢 MV Hondius 😱💀 turned into a FLOATING RAT ORGY 🐀🍆💦 with HANTAVIRUS 🦠🔥 hitting passengers HARDER than a bad batch of molly at Burning Man! 😵‍💫🕺 Seven CONFIRMED cases 🤒📈, two sus 😏, THREE DEAD BODIES 💀☠️ – including OG Dutch OOF grandpa 🧓🇳🇱 who kicked the bucket pre-test like a plot twist in a horror flick! 👻📽️ His wifey 👵 flew to South Africa 🇿🇦 and DROPPED DEAD 😵 two days later – confirmed RAT JUICE 🐀🧪 victim! German granny 💪🇩🇪 also BIT THE DUST on board May 2nd, making it a DEADLY TRIO 💀💀💀!

Yankee doodle 😎🇺🇸 and French babe 🥐👩 tested POSITIVE 🦠✅ after bailing ship – US bro landed in Nebraska 🌽🏠 for BIO-CONTAINMENT LOCKDOWN 🔒🦺 'cuz CDC daddy Jay Bhattacharya 🧑‍⚕️ said NO COVID PANIC MODE 😂🚫, human-to-human spread RARE AF like unicorn farts 🦄💨! But WHO boss Tedros 😤🌍 SHADED US for skimping on 42-day iso – 'MAY HAVE RISKS' 👀⚠️! French minister Stéphanie Rist 💅🇫🇷 spilling tea ☕: Paris chick ISOLATING 😷🛏️ health TANKING ⬇️😩, 22 contacts TRACED 👣🔍 like a detective simping for clues!

Two Brits 🇬🇧😷 getting PATCHED UP in Netherlands 🇳🇱 & South Africa 🇿🇦 – meanwhile 90+ peeps REPO'D 🛫📤 from Canary Islands 🏝️🇪🇸! Spaniards 😤🔥 quarantined at MILITARY HOSP 🏥⚔️, Aussies 🇦🇺🦘, Kiwi 🥝, Canucks 🍁 eh-ing in BC self-iso for 3 WEEKS ⏳😤! Ukrainians 🇺🇦💪 crewing the ghost ship to NL, no symptoms YET 👀 – captain Jan Dobrogowski 😢⛴️ dropped emo vid: 'THOUGHTS WITH THE GONE-ONCE 👻💔' past weeks CHALLENGING like Thanos snap! 🫰🌌

Andes strain 🏔️🦠 from South America rodent RAVE 🐀🎉 – symptoms? FEVER 🔥, FATIGUE 😴💤, MUSCLE BUTTS 😩🍑, VOMIT PUKES 🤮💦, BREATHLESS 😮‍💨🐟! But officials CHILL: 'LOW OUTBREAK RISK' 😌👍 – still pics of blue-gowned SPACE SUIT SIMPS 👨‍🚀😷 disembarking Tenerife like zombie apocalypse extras! 🧟‍♂️🏝️ 54 still ON BOARD 😱🚢, 22 flying NL incl delayed Aussies cuz plane GHOSTED ✈️👻! One cop in op DROPPED from HEART ATTACK 💔🚔 – RIP dude! 😢⚰️ Ship sailed from Ushuaia Argentina 🇦🇷🍖 April 1st, now parked in Grandilla de Abona like a cursed Love Boat! ❤️‍🩹🚢

WHO says RISK LOW but MV Hondius crew sweating 😰💦 harder than Elon at a Tesla recall – NO MAJOR PANDEMIC 🦠🚫, just cruise ship CURSE 🛳️😈! Passengers in bouffant caps & masks looking like rejected Blue Man Group 🤡🔵 – Manchester Brits 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 landed NO SYMPTOMS 😇, iso 72hrs! Dutch flight 26 peeps incl 8 locals 🧀🚀 – it's a GLOBAL HANTA HUSTLE 🦠🌍 with reps from EVERYWHERE slinging isolation tea! ☕😷 Stay safe or get RATTED OUT 🐀💀 bbs! ‼️🔥
